story: As a returning shopper, I want to log into my account so I can checkout.

cases.title: Auth modal opens on Login button click
cases.given: User opens /eclat-shop.html with a seeded user in localStorage

cases.title: Login form displays email and password fields
cases.then: email and password input fields are visible

cases.title: User logs in with seeded credentials
cases.given: Auth modal is open and user enters valid credentials
